pages.title: Summary
pages.text: A number of devices in this mod require gas heaters for heating.

pages.title: Gas Cooking Stove
pages.text: When connected by a gas canister containing gas, the right-click will have a probability to activate a gas cooking stove, and the activated gas cooking stove will continuously consume gas and heat the equipment above it.
Devices that can currently be heated: Baking Tray, Advance Furnace, Oven, Water Cauldron.
